item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Greek baked potato dish with roasted potatoes and Mediterranean vegetables,topped with golden halloumi, feta cream and tomato olive salad. Tzatziki andlemon on the side (6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Baked penne arrabbiata, also available gluten free, tossed in a rich tomato andgarlic sauce with soy protein and vegetables, topped with cheese and bakeduntil golden. Finished with fresh gremolata. Zucchini and rocket salad withpesto and lemon on the side (1+6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Baked potato filled with white beans, miso and crème fraîche, flavoured withwild garlic and topped with crispy fried capers (6+7+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Daal på linser og kokosmælk med varme krydderier, serveret med friskbagtnaanbrød og urter (1+6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Chole bhature, indisk kikærtecurry med varme krydderier, serveret med sprødtfriteret brød og toppet med friske urter. Hertil rødløg vendt med sumak,myntechutney og lime a part (1+6+13+15)
